primary_text:
When FarmThru's Birchal campaign opens mid-2026, the waitlist goes first.

FarmThru is already running. A Brookvale hub open five days a week. Named regenerative farms across NSW. Fresh food reaching families within days of leaving the farm.

The equity crowdfunding campaign will let everyday people become part-owners of this grocery model. Waitlist members get first access when the campaign goes live.

Want to own a piece of how food should work? Get on the list before it opens.
headline: The waitlist gets first access
description: FarmThru equity crowdfunding on Birchal, mid-2026. Waitlist opens the door first. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Bold, confident headline treatment on warm background. Subtle countdown element showing 'mid-2026'. Urgency through clarity, not pressure.
